expectations.text: All four requirement IDs (FR-O2C-01 through FR-O2C-04) are present in the output
expectations.evidence: All four IDs appear as row headers in the Fit-Gap Table: FR-O2C-01, FR-O2C-02, FR-O2C-03, FR-O2C-04.

expectations.text: Every requirement row has an explicit fit classification (S/C/X/O)
expectations.evidence: FR-O2C-01=C, FR-O2C-02=X, FR-O2C-03=X, FR-O2C-04=X. All rows have a Fit column populated.

expectations.text: Every requirement row has both an effort estimate and a risk level
expectations.evidence: All four rows have Effort (M, M, L, XL) and Risk (Low, Medium, Medium, High) columns populated.

expectations.text: Commission calculation (FR-O2C-04) is classified as Customization
expectations.evidence: FR-O2C-04 classified X (Customization). Solution: Scheduled SuiteScript 2.1 Map/Reduce writing Journal Entries.

expectations.text: Output includes a summary or count-by-category section
expectations.evidence: Has 'Summary' section with 'Count by Fit Category' table, High-Risk Items table, and Open Questions Tracker with 13 items.

expectations.text: Each requirement has a Solution ID assigned (e.g. SDD reference, CUST-xx, or similar)
expectations.evidence: Solution IDs assigned: CUST-O2C-01, SDD-O2C §3.2 / CUST-O2C-02 (fallback), CUST-O2C-03, CUST-O2C-04.
